meta.purpose: Direct manual/API testing dataset covering every documented use case and business flow under documents/.
notes: Use placeholders in double braces, for example {{buyerToken}}, {{runId}}, {{productId.reviewApprove}}.
Do not overwrite the legacy seed files in test-datasets/*.json; this dataset is an overlay for manual and E2E coverage.
For Stripe webhooks, generate a valid Stripe-Signature with stripe-webhook.ps1, Stripe CLI, or the E2E helper. Raw unsigned webhook payloads should fail.

lookupPlan.extract: Pick any leaf category id from response data.

buyerCancel.reason: Changed mind during full coverage run {{runId}}

sellerCancel.reason: Seller cannot fulfill this paid order

refundPartial.reason: Item arrived with a visible issue.

refundFullParent.reason: Full parent-order refund requested by buyer.

refundPartialParent.reason: Partial multi-seller refund requested by buyer.

returnToSenderMultipartFields.reason: Wrong item returned to sender by seller

adminRefundReject.reason: Evidence is not sufficient for refund approval.

rejectItem.reason: Flash price does not meet campaign rules.

sendMessage.message: Find an audio product under 7000000 VND and explain why it is suitable.

assert: JWT access token accepted before logout
logged-out token cannot access protected routes
password can be restored for repeatable runs
only active public products are listed
SKU lookup returns a variant id
product is not public until approved/published
variant create/update/delete changes seller variant list
image metadata can be registered and removed
stock and audit log reflect changes
inventory events are emitted for downstream search
stock reservation is PENDING until payment outcome
cart payload includes items and warnings
cart contains variant with requested quantity
quantity zero is rejected and DELETE remains removal path
single item removal and clear cart are idempotent
pending submitted product is visible to admin

body.reason: Description is too short for approval.

assert: pending payment intent cancelled when applicable
buyer refund request creates PENDING refund
auto full refund requested for paid order
already complete seller is rejected idempotently
transaction eventually exists after checkout event
delivered paid order creates or advances seller transfer
Stripe account incomplete state is visible if transfer cannot execute
seller payment dashboard endpoints are routed to payment-service
refund-service consumed refund.requested and created PENDING refund
admin approval changes refund state or reports Stripe limitation for forged PaymentIntent

steps.wait: Poll until end_time + worker latency, then re-query session detail and search index.

assert: buy path decrements flash stock when session ACTIVE
query, filter, sort, and suggestion paths respond
status progresses without duplicate concurrent jobs

cases.trigger: Run an order status, refund, or flash sale event in another terminal.

assert: new event arrives after Kafka consumer processes trigger
single read and read-all are idempotent
SSE emits delta/done or a documented provider error
history contains user and assistant/tool records when LLM key is valid

body.message: Add SKU-MAGSAFE to my cart if available.

assert: confirm endpoint executes or rejects with documented error
